title: pleopeltis werneri
intro: Pleopeltis werneri, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pleopeltis werneri include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
